commit_message:
Update PIPE IP core and docs Update PIPE IP core and docs - Add README
- Add image source
- Update Makefile to solve implementation error (CC_MX8)
- Update nextpnr flag to optimize place and route
- Remove PLL instantiation in PIPE logic, use clock divider instead
- Fix timing error for critical path in rx_mux and tx_demux
- Add PIPE Wrapper for PIPE logic and SerDes

examples.commit_message:
Update PIPE IP core and docs Update PIPE IP core and docs - Add README
- Add image source
- Update Makefile to solve implementation error (CC_MX8)
- Update nextpnr flag to optimize place and route
- Remove PLL instantiation in PIPE logic, use clock divider instead
- Fix timing error for critical path in rx_mux and tx_demux
- Add PIPE Wrapper for PIPE logic and SerDes
examples.patch:
@@ -5,9 +5,9 @@ NEXTPNR = nextpnr-himbaechel
 PACK = gmpack
 OFL = openFPGALoader
 
-TOP = ccfpga_pipe_logic
+TOP = ccfpga_pipe_test
 PRFLAGS  = -ccf src/$(TOP).ccf -cCP -crc
-NEXTPNRFLAGS = --vopt allow-unconstrained
+NEXTPNRFLAGS =
 OFLFLAGS = --index-chain 0
 
 ## target sources
@@ -22,17 +22,20 @@ testcase: serdesflow_mod
 net/$(TOP)_synth.json: $(VLOG_SRC)
 	mkdir -p log/
 	mkdir -p net/
-	$(YOSYS) -l log/synth.log -p 'read_verilog -sv $^; synth_gatemate -top $(TOP) -luttree $(YSFLAGS) -vlog net/$(TOP)_synth.v -json net/$(TOP)_synth.json'
+	$(YOSYS) -l log/synth.log -p 'read_verilog -sv $^; synth_gatemate -nomx8 -top $(TOP) -luttree $(YSFLAGS) -vlog net/$(TOP)_synth.v -json net/$(TOP)_synth.json'
 
 $(TOP).txt: net/$(TOP)_synth.json src/$(TOP).ccf
-	$(NEXTPNR) --device CCGM1A1 --json net/$(TOP)_synth.json --vopt ccf=src/$(TOP).ccf $(NEXTPNRFLAGS) --vopt out=$(TOP).txt --router router2
+	$(NEXTPNR) --device CCGM1A1 --json net/$(TOP)_synth.json --vopt ccf=src/$(TOP).ccf $(NEXTPNRFLAGS) --vopt out=$(TOP).txt --router router2 -luttree
 
 $(TOP).bit: $(TOP).txt
 	$(PACK) $(TOP).txt $(TOP).bit
 
 jtag: $(TOP).bit
 	$(OFL) $(OFLFLAGS) -b gatemate_evb_jtag $(TOP).bit
 
+spi: $(TOP).bit
+	$(OFL) $(OFLFLAGS) -b gatemate_evb_spi -m $(TOP).bit
+
 clean:
 	$(RM) rm log/*.log
 	$(RM) net/*_synth.json
@@ -44,3 +47,4 @@ clean:
 	$(RM) -rf log
 	$(RM) sim/*.vvp
 	$(RM) *.bit
+	$(RM) uttree
examples.before_code:
SHELL := /bin/bash
## tools
YOSYS = yosys
NEXTPNR = nextpnr-himbaechel
PACK = gmpack
OFL = openFPGALoader

TOP = ccfpga_pipe_logic
PRFLAGS  = -ccf src/$(TOP).ccf -cCP -crc
NEXTPNRFLAGS = --vopt allow-unconstrained
OFLFLAGS = --index-chain 0

## target sources
VLOG_SRC = $(shell find ./src/ -type f \( -iname \*.v -o -iname \*.sv \))
VHDL_SRC = $(shell find ./src/ -type f \( -iname \*.vhd -o -iname \*.vhdl \))

## testcases
testcase: serdesflow_mod
	source serdesflow_mod

## open source toolchain
net/$(TOP)_synth.json: $(VLOG_SRC)
	mkdir -p log/
	mkdir -p net/
	$(YOSYS) -l log/synth.log -p 'read_verilog -sv $^; synth_gatemate -top $(TOP) -luttree $(YSFLAGS) -vlog net/$(TOP)_synth.v -json net/$(TOP)_synth.json'

$(TOP).txt: net/$(TOP)_synth.json src/$(TOP).ccf
	$(NEXTPNR) --device CCGM1A1 --json net/$(TOP)_synth.json --vopt ccf=src/$(TOP).ccf $(NEXTPNRFLAGS) --vopt out=$(TOP).txt --router router2

$(TOP).bit: $(TOP).txt
	$(PACK) $(TOP).txt $(TOP).bit

jtag: $(TOP).bit
	$(OFL) $(OFLFLAGS) -b gatemate_evb_jtag $(TOP).bit

clean:
	$(RM) rm log/*.log
	$(RM) net/*_synth.json
	$(RM) net/*_synth.v
	$(RM) work-obj*.cf
	$(RM) *.txt
	$(RM) *.sdf
	$(RM) -rf net
	$(RM) -rf log
	$(RM) sim/*.vvp
	$(RM) *.bit
examples.after_code:
SHELL := /bin/bash
## tools
YOSYS = yosys
NEXTPNR = nextpnr-himbaechel
PACK = gmpack
OFL = openFPGALoader

TOP = ccfpga_pipe_test
PRFLAGS  = -ccf src/$(TOP).ccf -cCP -crc
NEXTPNRFLAGS =
OFLFLAGS = --index-chain 0

## target sources
VLOG_SRC = $(shell find ./src/ -type f \( -iname \*.v -o -iname \*.sv \))
VHDL_SRC = $(shell find ./src/ -type f \( -iname \*.vhd -o -iname \*.vhdl \))

## testcases
testcase: serdesflow_mod
	source serdesflow_mod

## open source toolchain
net/$(TOP)_synth.json: $(VLOG_SRC)
	mkdir -p log/
	mkdir -p net/
	$(YOSYS) -l log/synth.log -p 'read_verilog -sv $^; synth_gatemate -nomx8 -top $(TOP) -luttree $(YSFLAGS) -vlog net/$(TOP)_synth.v -json net/$(TOP)_synth.json'

$(TOP).txt: net/$(TOP)_synth.json src/$(TOP).ccf
	$(NEXTPNR) --device CCGM1A1 --json net/$(TOP)_synth.json --vopt ccf=src/$(TOP).ccf $(NEXTPNRFLAGS) --vopt out=$(TOP).txt --router router2 -luttree

$(TOP).bit: $(TOP).txt
	$(PACK) $(TOP).txt $(TOP).bit

jtag: $(TOP).bit
	$(OFL) $(OFLFLAGS) -b gatemate_evb_jtag $(TOP).bit

spi: $(TOP).bit
	$(OFL) $(OFLFLAGS) -b gatemate_evb_spi -m $(TOP).bit

clean:
	$(RM) rm log/*.log
	$(RM) net/*_synth.json
	$(RM) net/*_synth.v
	$(RM) work-obj*.cf
	$(RM) *.txt
	$(RM) *.sdf
	$(RM) -rf net
	$(RM) -rf log
	$(RM) sim/*.vvp
	$(RM) *.bit
	$(RM) uttree

examples.patch:
@@ -27,7 +27,7 @@
 ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
 
 module ccfpga_pipe_tx_demux #(
-    parameter DATA_BYTES = 2,               // Set to configure width of used datapath (PIPE)
+    parameter DATA_BYTES = 4,               // Set to configure width of used datapath (PIPE)
     parameter DATA_WIDTH  = DATA_BYTES*8    // Used to configure bitwidth of datapath
     )
     (
@@ -52,39 +52,217 @@ module ccfpga_pipe_tx_demux #(
 
     // clocked demux for data
     always@ (posedge i_clk, posedge i_reset) begin
-        if(i_reset == 1'b1) begin
-          o_data <= {64{1'b0}};
-          s_msb  <= MSB_INIT;
-         end
-        else begin
-          if (i_enable == 1'b1) begin
-            o_data[s_msb -: DATA_WIDTH] <= i_data;
-            if (s_msb == 6'd63)
-              s_msb <= MSB_INIT;
-            else
-              s_msb <= s_msb + DATA_WIDTH;
-          end
+      if(i_reset == 1'b1) begin
+        s_msb  <= MSB_INIT;
+      end
+      else begin
+        if (i_enable == 1'b1) begin
+          if (s_msb == 6'd63)
+            s_msb <= MSB_INIT;
+          else
+            s_msb <= s_msb + DATA_WIDTH;
         end
-     end
+      end
+    end
 
     // clocked demux for k data and disparity (compliance)
     always@ (posedge i_clk, posedge i_reset) begin
-        if(i_reset == 1'b1) begin
-          o_dispar  <= {8{1'b0}};
-          o_k_data  <= {8{1'b0}};
-          s_msb_k   <= MSB_INIT_K;
-         end
-        else begin
-          if (i_enable == 1'b1) begin
-            o_k_data[s_msb_k -: DATA_BYTES] <= i_k_data;
-            o_dispar[s_msb_k -: DATA_BYTES] <= i_compl;
-
-            if (s_msb_k == 3'd7)
-              s_msb_k <= MSB_INIT_K;
-            else
+      if(i_reset == 1'b1) begin
+        s_msb_k   <= MSB_INIT_K;
+        end
+      else begin
+        if (i_enable == 1'b1) begin
+          if (s_msb_k == 3'd7)
+            s_msb_k <= MSB_INIT_K;
+          else
             s_msb_k <= s_msb_k + DATA_BYTES;
-          end
         end
+      end
     end
 
+    generate
+      if(DATA_BYTES == 1) begin // 8-Bit PIPE
+        // clocked demux for data
+        always@ (posedge i_clk, posedge i_reset) begin
+          if(i_reset == 1'b1) begin
+            o_data <= {64{1'b0}};
+          end
+          else begin
+            if (i_enable == 1'b1) begin
+              case (s_msb)
+                6'd7: begin
+                  o_data[7:0] <= i_data;
+                end
+                6'd15: begin
+                  o_data[15:8] <= i_data;
+                end
+                6'd23: begin
+                  o_data[23:16] <= i_data;
+                end
+                6'd31: begin
+                  o_data[31:24] <= i_data;
+                end
+                6'd39: begin
+                  o_data[39:32] <= i_data;
+                end
+                6'd47: begin
+                  o_data[47:40] <= i_data;
+                end
+                6'd55: begin
+                  o_data[55:48] <= i_data;
+                end
+                6'd63: begin
+                  o_data[63:56] <= i_data;
+                end
+              endcase
+            end
+          end
+        end
+
+        // clocked demux for k data and disparity (compliance)
+        always@ (posedge i_clk, posedge i_reset) begin
+          if(i_reset == 1'b1) begin
+            o_dispar  <= {8{1'b0}};
+            o_k_data  <= {8{1'b0}};
+            end
+          else begin
+            if (i_enable == 1'b1) begin
+              case (s_msb_k)
+                3'd0: begin
+                  o_k_data[0] <= i_k_data;
+                  o_dispar[0] <= i_compl;
+                end
+                3'd1: begin
+                  o_k_data[1] <= i_k_data;
+                  o_dispar[1] <= i_compl;
+                end
+                3'd2: begin
+                  o_k_data[2] <= i_k_data;
+                  o_dispar[2] <= i_compl;
+                end
+                3'd3: begin
+                  o_k_data[3] <= i_k_data;
+                  o_dispar[3] <= i_compl;
+                end
+                3'd4: begin
+                  o_k_data[4] <= i_k_data;
+                  o_dispar[4] <= i_compl;
+                end
+                3'd5: begin
+                  o_k_data[5] <= i_k_data;
+                  o_dispar[5] <= i_compl;
+                end
+                3'd6: begin
+                  o_k_data[6] <= i_k_data;
+                  o_dispar[6] <= i_compl;
+                end
+                3'd7: begin
+                  o_k_data[7] <= i_k_data;
+                  o_dispar[7] <= i_compl;
+                end
+              endcase
+            end
+          end
+        end
+      end
+      else if (DATA_BYTES == 2) begin // 16-Bit PIPE
+        // clocked demux for data
+        always@ (posedge i_clk, posedge i_reset) begin
+          if(i_reset == 1'b1) begin
+            o_data <= {64{1'b0}};
+            end
+          else begin
+            if (i_enable == 1'b1) begin
+              case (s_msb)
+                6'd15: begin
+                  o_data[15:0] <= i_data;
+                end
+                6'd31: begin
+                  o_data[31:16] <= i_data;
+                end
+                6'd47: begin
+                  o_data[47:32] <= i_data;
+                end
+                6'd63: begin
+                  o_data[63:48] <= i_data;
+                end
+              endcase
+            end
+          end
+        end
+
+        // clocked demux for k data and disparity (compliance)
+        always@ (posedge i_clk, posedge i_reset) begin
+          if(i_reset == 1'b1) begin
+            o_dispar  <= {8{1'b0}};
+            o_k_data  <= {8{1'b0}};
+            end
+          else begin
+            if (i_enable == 1'b1) begin
+              case (s_msb_k)
+                3'd1: begin
+                  o_k_data[1:0] <= i_k_data;
+                  o_dispar[1:0] <= i_compl;
+                end
+                3'd3: begin
+                  o_k_data[3:2] <= i_k_data;
+                  o_dispar[3:2] <= i_compl;
+                end
+                3'd5: begin
+                  o_k_data[5:4] <= i_k_data;
+                  o_dispar[5:4] <= i_compl;
+                end
+                3'd7: begin
+                  o_k_data[7:6] <= i_k_data;
+                  o_dispar[7:6] <= i_compl;
+                end
+              endcase
+            end
+          end
+        end
+      end
+      else begin // 32-Bit PIPE
+        // clocked demux for data
+        always@ (posedge i_clk, posedge i_reset) begin
+          if(i_reset == 1'b1) begin
+            o_data <= {64{1'b0}};
+            end
+          else begin
+            if (i_enable == 1'b1) begin
+              case (s_msb)
+                6'd31: begin
+                  o_data[31:0] <= i_data;
+                end
+                6'd63: begin
+                  o_data[63:32] <= i_data;
+                end
+              endcase
+            end
+          end
+        end
+
+        // clocked demux for k data and disparity (compliance)
+        always@ (posedge i_clk, posedge i_reset) begin
+          if(i_reset == 1'b1) begin
+            o_dispar  <= {8{1'b0}};
+            o_k_data  <= {8{1'b0}};
+            end
+          else begin
+            if (i_enable == 1'b1) begin
+              case (s_msb_k)
+                3'd3: begin
+                  o_k_data[3:0] <= i_k_data;
+                  o_dispar[3:0] <= i_compl;
+                end
+                3'd7: begin
+                  o_k_data[7:4] <= i_k_data;
+                  o_dispar[7:4] <= i_compl;
+                end
+              endcase
+            end
+          end
+        end
+      end
+    endgenerate
+
 endmodule
\ No newline at end of file
